RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABLITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHEN, YUJIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABLITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEN, YUJIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $4,060.00 RENT, $340.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $477.00 COSTS, $6,006.15 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $6,770.97 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,112.18, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABLITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHEN, YUJIA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABLITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEN, YUJIA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 399 FREMONT STREET #2006, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
